_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PANEL
name: GregTech New Horizons
author: looordi@orkenstein.com
description:
GTNH egg for versions 2.8.0+ (Java 17-25). Supports stable, beta releases and optional latest daily builds.
Comes with an update script that handles updates easily (custom edits to configs reset on reinstall).
Just change the version and reinstall to update (stable to daily update works too).
Make sure to back up before reinstalling!

Beta builds: set wanted beta build to Modpack version env like 2.9.0-beta-1.

Daily builds: set GTNH_DAILY=true to install the latest successful Java 17-25 daily server build.

More info:
https://wiki.gtnewhorizons.com/wiki/Server_Setup#Server_Update

https://www.gtnewhorizons.com/downloads/

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# GregTech New Horizons 2.8.X Install Script
# Supports stable releases and optional latest daily build.
# 05.05.2026
# Memory env now deprecated and now this egg uses the containers memory value for the server
# Added support for daily builds
# 10.5.2026
# Daily build downloading fixed from expecting double zipped server file
# New env for downloading specified daily
# Container reserved memory changed from 90% to 95% for gtnh
# 21.5.2026
# Now preserves ops, whitelist, both banned json and servertutil ranks
# 08.6.2026
# Now supports beta releases

set -euo pipefail
trap 'echo "ERROR: install failed on line $LINENO"; exit 1' ERR

: "${GTVERSION:=2.8.4}"
: "${GTNH_DAILY:=false}"
: "${GITHUB_TOKEN:=}"
: "${GTNH_DAILY_BUILD:=}"

BASE_DIR="/mnt/server"
WORK_DIR="$BASE_DIR/.gtnh-install-work"
EXTRACT_DIR="$WORK_DIR/extracted"
BACKUP_DIR="$WORK_DIR/backup"

mkdir -p "$BASE_DIR"

echo "Installing dependencies..."
apt update
DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt install -y curl jq unzip ca-certificates rsync

rm -rf "$WORK_DIR"
mkdir -p "$EXTRACT_DIR" "$BACKUP_DIR"

github_headers=(
  -H "Accept: application/vnd.github+json"
  -H "X-GitHub-Api-Version: 2022-11-28"
)

if [[ -n "${GITHUB_TOKEN}" ]]; then
  github_headers+=(-H "Authorization: Bearer ${GITHUB_TOKEN}")
fi

github_api_curl() {
  curl -fsSL --connect-timeout 20 --max-time 120 --retry 3 --retry-delay 3 \
    "${github_headers[@]}" "$@"
}

github_download_curl() {
  curl -fL --connect-timeout 20 --max-time 900 --retry 3 --retry-delay 3 \
    "${github_headers[@]}" "$@"
}

validate_pack() {
  local dir="$1"

  if [[ ! -f "$dir/java9args.txt" ]]; then
    echo "ERROR: downloaded pack is missing java9args.txt"
    find "$dir" -maxdepth 2 -type f | sed 's#^#  #' | head -n 80
    exit 1
  fi

  if [[ ! -f "$dir/lwjgl3ify-forgePatches.jar" ]]; then
    echo "ERROR: downloaded pack is missing lwjgl3ify-forgePatches.jar"
    find "$dir" -maxdepth 2 -type f | sed 's#^#  #' | head -n 80
    exit 1
  fi

  echo "Pack validation OK."
}

download_stable_to_temp() {
  local zip_file="GT_New_Horizons_${GTVERSION}_Server_Java_17-25.zip"
  local base_url="https://downloads.gtnewhorizons.com/ServerPacks"

  if [[ "${GTVERSION,,}" == *"beta"* || "${GTVERSION,,}" == *"rc"* ]]; then
    base_url="${base_url}/betas"
  fi

  local url="${base_url}/${zip_file}"

  echo "Daily builds disabled. Downloading GTNH ${GTVERSION}..."
  echo "Download URL: ${url}"

  curl -fL --connect-timeout 20 --max-time 900 --retry 3 --retry-delay 3 \
    -o "$WORK_DIR/$zip_file" "$url"

  unzip -q -o "$WORK_DIR/$zip_file" -d "$EXTRACT_DIR"
  validate_pack "$EXTRACT_DIR"
}

download_daily_to_temp() {
  echo "Daily builds enabled. Searching GTNH daily Java 17-25 server zip..."

  if [[ -z "${GITHUB_TOKEN}" ]]; then
    echo "ERROR: GITHUB_TOKEN is required for daily builds."
    echo "GitHub Actions artifact downloads return HTTP 401 without authentication."
    echo "Stable releases do not require a token. Set GTNH_DAILY=false to use stable."
    exit 1
  fi

  if [[ -n "${GTNH_DAILY_BUILD}" ]]; then
    echo "Requested daily build number: ${GTNH_DAILY_BUILD}"
  else
    echo "No daily build number set. Using latest successful daily build."
  fi

  local runs_api="https://api.github.com/repos/GTNewHorizons/DreamAssemblerXXL/actions/workflows/daily-modpack-build.yml/runs?branch=master&status=success&per_page=100"
  local runs_json
  runs_json="$(github_api_curl "$runs_api")"

  local serverzip=""
  local run_id=""

  while read -r run_id; do
    [[ -z "$run_id" || "$run_id" == "null" ]] && continue

    echo "Checking workflow run ${run_id}..."

    # Download only Java 17-25 daily server zip
    # Wont ever download java 8 version
    if [[ -n "${GTNH_DAILY_BUILD}" ]]; then
      serverzip="$(
        github_api_curl "https://api.github.com/repos/GTNewHorizons/DreamAssemblerXXL/actions/runs/${run_id}/artifacts" \
          | jq -c --arg build "+${GTNH_DAILY_BUILD}-server-java17-25" \
            '.artifacts[]? | select(
              (.expired == false) and
              (.name | contains($build)) and
              (.name | test("server-java17-25(\\.zip)?$"))
            )' \
          | head -n1 || true
      )"
    else
      serverzip="$(
        github_api_curl "https://api.github.com/repos/GTNewHorizons/DreamAssemblerXXL/actions/runs/${run_id}/artifacts" \
          | jq -c '.artifacts[]? | select(
              (.expired == false) and
              (.name | test("server-java17-25(\\.zip)?$"))
            )' \
          | head -n1 || true
      )"
    fi

    if [[ -n "$serverzip" && "$serverzip" != "null" ]]; then
      break
    fi
  done < <(jq -r '.workflow_runs[].id' <<< "$runs_json")

  if [[ -z "$serverzip" || "$serverzip" == "null" ]]; then
    if [[ -n "${GTNH_DAILY_BUILD}" ]]; then
      echo "ERROR: Could not find requested GTNH daily Java 17-25 server build: ${GTNH_DAILY_BUILD}"
      echo "Example value: 508"
    else
      echo "ERROR: Could not find a non-expired GTNH daily Java 17-25 server zip."
    fi
    exit 1
  fi

  local serverzip_name
  local download_url
  serverzip_name="$(jq -r '.name' <<< "$serverzip")"
  download_url="$(jq -r '.archive_download_url' <<< "$serverzip")"

  echo "Found daily server zip: ${serverzip_name}"
  echo "Downloading daily server zip, this will take a while..."

  if ! github_download_curl -o "$WORK_DIR/gtnh-daily-server-java17-25.zip" "$download_url"; then
    echo "ERROR: GitHub daily server zip download failed."
    echo "Check that GITHUB_TOKEN is valid and has read access to GitHub Actions downloads."
    exit 1
  fi

  echo "Extracting downloaded daily server zip..."
  unzip -q -o "$WORK_DIR/gtnh-daily-server-java17-25.zip" -d "$EXTRACT_DIR"
  validate_pack "$EXTRACT_DIR"
}

case "${GTNH_DAILY,,}" in
  true)
    download_daily_to_temp
    ;;
  false)
    download_stable_to_temp
    ;;
  *)
    echo "ERROR: GTNH_DAILY must be true or false."
    exit 1
    ;;
esac

if [[ -d "$BASE_DIR/config/JourneyMapServer" ]]; then
  echo "Backing up JourneyMapServer..."
  cp -a "$BASE_DIR/config/JourneyMapServer" "$BACKUP_DIR/"
else
  echo "No JourneyMapServer directory found to back up."
fi

#this might break something in the future
echo "Backing up serverutil settings, ops, whitelist and banned players files..."

for path in \
  "ops.json" \
  "whitelist.json" \
  "banned-players.json" \
  "banned-ips.json" \
  "serverutilities/server/ranks.txt"
do
  if [[ -e "$BASE_DIR/$path" ]]; then
    echo "Preserving $path"
    mkdir -p "$BACKUP_DIR/$(dirname "$path")"
    cp -a "$BASE_DIR/$path" "$BACKUP_DIR/$path"
  fi
done

echo "Replacing old GTNH pack files and folders..."
rm -rf \
  "$BASE_DIR/config" \
  "$BASE_DIR/libraries" \
  "$BASE_DIR/mods" \
  "$BASE_DIR/lwjgl3ify-forgePatches.jar" \
  "$BASE_DIR/java9args.txt"

rsync -a --no-perms \
  --exclude='.gtnh-install-work' \
  "$EXTRACT_DIR"/ "$BASE_DIR"/

#this fixes daily builds for having weird permissions in them
echo "Fixing file and directory permissions..."
find "$BASE_DIR" -type d -exec chmod 755 {} \;
find "$BASE_DIR" -type f -exec chmod 644 {} \;

rm -f "$BASE_DIR"/*.bat

if [[ -f "$BASE_DIR/startserver-java9.sh" ]]; then
  chmod +x "$BASE_DIR/startserver-java9.sh"
fi

if [[ -d "$BACKUP_DIR/JourneyMapServer" ]]; then
  echo "Restoring JourneyMapServer..."
  mkdir -p "$BASE_DIR/config"
  cp -a "$BACKUP_DIR/JourneyMapServer" "$BASE_DIR/config/"
else
  echo "No JourneyMapServer backup found - skipping restore."
fi

#this might break something in the future
echo "Restoring serverutil settings, ops, whitelist and banned players files..."

for path in \
  "ops.json" \
  "whitelist.json" \
  "banned-players.json" \
  "banned-ips.json" \
  "serverutilities/server/ranks.txt"
do
  if [[ -e "$BACKUP_DIR/$path" ]]; then
    echo "Restoring $path"
    mkdir -p "$BASE_DIR/$(dirname "$path")"
    cp -a "$BACKUP_DIR/$path" "$BASE_DIR/$path"
  fi
done

rm -rf "$WORK_DIR"

echo "Installation process is completed"

variables.name: Daily Build Number
variables.description: Optional. Only used when GTNH_DAILY=true. Leave empty for latest daily, or set a build number like 508.

variables.name: GitHub Token
variables.description: Required only when GTNH_DAILY=true. Used to download GitHub Actions daily builds. Stable releases do not use this. Only admins see this token

variables.name: Hardcore Mode
variables.description: Enable Hardcore Mode for the world

variables.name: Max Players
variables.description: Set a total server player limit

variables.name: Modpack version
variables.description: GTNH version for java 17-25 file. Stable and beta supported. For example: 2.8.4 or 2.9.0-beta-1

variables.name: Old memory env (deprecated)
variables.description:
Legacy compatibility to prevent a crash only if installed using earlier version of this egg. 
Update startup command manually in admin view if so: 
java -Xms128M -XX:MaxRAMPercentage=95.0 -Dfml.readTimeout=180 @java9args.txt -jar lwjgl3ify-forgePatches.jar nogui

variables.name: Query Port
variables.description: Set the query port for the server

variables.name: Server Seed
variables.description: Set a custom seed for the World map

variables.name: Use Daily Builds
variables.description: Use latest GTNH daily server-new-java build instead of stable GTVERSION. Requires GITHUB_TOKEN.
